description: Route only house, door, board, window, mailbox, forest, tree, and songbird nouns through reactive-surface wrappers

replacements.old:
<OBJECT TREE
	(IN LOCAL-GLOBALS)
	(SYNONYM TREE BRANCH)
	(ADJECTIVE LARGE STORM ;"-TOSSED")
	(DESC "tree")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT CLIMBBIT)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT TREE
	(IN LOCAL-GLOBALS)
	(SYNONYM TREE BRANCH)
	(ADJECTIVE LARGE STORM ;"-TOSSED")
	(DESC "tree")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT CLIMBBIT)
	(ACTION SURFACE-TREE-F)>

replacements.old:
<OBJECT FRONT-DOOR
	(IN WEST-OF-HOUSE)
	(SYNONYM DOOR)
	(ADJECTIVE FRONT BOARDED)
	(DESC "door")
	(FLAGS DOORBIT NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION FRONT-DOOR-FCN)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT FRONT-DOOR
	(IN WEST-OF-HOUSE)
	(SYNONYM DOOR)
	(ADJECTIVE FRONT BOARDED)
	(DESC "door")
	(FLAGS DOORBIT NDESCBIT)
	(ACTION SURFACE-FRONT-DOOR-F)>
